name: diag-edges-thick
description: Force linewidth to 50px — if all 552 segments draw, we'll see a thick mess. If only 1 still, there's an instance-count bug.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1200)); const r = window.__qualiaRenderer; r.setPerfSettings({ edgeWidthPx: 50, nodesVisible: false }); await new Promise(r2 => setTimeout(r2, 500)); const sm = r.getSceneManager(); const em = sm.edgeMesh; return { lw: em.lineSegments.material.linewidth, instCount: em.lineSegments.geometry.instanceCount, nodesVisible: false, segmentCount: em.count }; })()
